name: NTS ASA
summary: NTS ASA, an integrated aquaculture company, engages in the aquaculture, well-boat, sea transport, and service boat businesses in Norway. The company produces salmon; provides well-boat shipping services; and transports fish and fish products by sea and land. It also supplies various safety systems for boats, fish farms, and land customers; and provides preparation, implementation, and maintenance services for management systems and security management systems. In addition, the company operates boat and ferry connections; and offers diving services and other services for the aquaculture and other sectors. It operates 15 connections, including 10 ferry connections, 4 fast ferry routes, and 1 local boat route, as well as 23 service vessels. The company was founded in 1879 and is based in Kolvereid, Norway.
